---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=25mm
      - left=20mm
      - right=20mm
    fontsize: 11pt
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: "orange"
    urlcolor: "orange"
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{graphicx}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{float}
        \usepackage{tikz}

        \definecolor{eaorange}{HTML}{E86825}
        \definecolor{eagray}{HTML}{2C2C2C}
        \definecolor{ealightgray}{HTML}{F5F5F5}

        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{3pt}
        \renewcommand{\headrule}{\hbox to\headwidth{\color{eaorange}\leaders\hrule height \headrulewidth\hfill}}
        \fancyhead[L]{\small\color{eagray}\textbf{EXTREMO AMBIENTE} \textbar\ Event Proposal}
        \fancyhead[R]{\small\color{eagray}{{date}}}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\small\color{eagray}\thepage}
        \fancyfoot[R]{\small\color{eagray}Extremo Ambiente Lda.}
---

\begin{center}
\includegraphics[width=4cm]{assets/logo.png}

\vspace{0.5cm}

{\Huge\bfseries\color{eagray} Event Proposal}

\vspace{0.3cm}

{\Large\color{eaorange} {{client_name}}}

\vspace{0.2cm}

{\large {{date}} \textbar\ {{location}}}

\vspace{0.5cm}
\textcolor{eaorange}{\rule{0.6\textwidth}{2pt}}
\end{center}

\vspace{1cm}

# Event Overview

| | |
|---|---|
| **Client** | {{client_name}} |
| **Date** | {{date}} |
| **Group Size** | {{group_size}} people |
| **Location** | {{location}} |
| **Duration** | {{start_time}} - {{end_time}} ({{duration_hours}}h) |
| **Preferences** | {{preferences}} |

{{#special_requests}}

::: {.callout-note}
**Special Requests:** {{special_requests_text}}
:::

{{/special_requests}}

\vspace{0.5cm}

# Executive Summary

{{executive_summary}}

\vspace{0.5cm}

# Detailed Itinerary

{{itinerary_table}}

\vspace{0.5cm}

# Pricing Breakdown

{{pricing_table}}

{{#has_discount}}
*Group discount (5%) applied for groups over 10 people.*
{{/has_discount}}

\vspace{0.3cm}

| | |
|---|---|
| **Total** | **EUR {{total}}** |
| **Per Person** | **EUR {{per_person}}** |

\vspace{0.5cm}

# What's Included

- Professional guide throughout the experience
- All transportation between stops
- Activity fees and entrance tickets
- Coordination and event management

{{#has_food}}
- Food and beverage experiences as listed in the itinerary
{{/has_food}}

\vspace{0.5cm}

# Route Map

View the full route on Google Maps:

{{google_maps_url}}

\vspace{0.5cm}

---

\begin{center}
\textcolor{eaorange}{\rule{0.4\textwidth}{1pt}}

\vspace{0.3cm}

{\small\color{eagray} \textbf{Extremo Ambiente} \textbar\ Adventure Tourism \& Corporate Events}

{\small\color{eagray} Porto, Portugal \textbar\ info@extremoambiente.pt}
\end{center}
